analysis: Cross-model union-anchor economics for the Z1 sparse-DFT pilot, computed from recorded campaign artifacts only (no DFT run).

anchor_rule.definition: per model per path: {0, n-1, model-min} u {model-max-window .. model-max+window}, clamped, de-duplicated; window = 2 when image_count <= 6 else 1

deferred_from_dft_execution.note: large-cell paths deferred from GPAW execution; they REMAIN in this cross-model prediction analysis

agreement_conventions.all_four_required: agreement counted only when all four models have data AND agree
agreement_conventions.available_models: agreement among the models with a completed profile on that path

definitions.naive_dft_evaluations: sum over models of sum over paths of |A(m,p)| — each model pays its own sparse DFT independently
definitions.union_dft_evaluations: sum over paths of |union over models A(m,p)| — one DFT evaluation per unique image index per path, shared across models
